name: Soft Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 Degrees F.
2. Sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt and set aside.
3. Work the shortening and butter together with a spoon until fluffy and creamy.
4. Add the sugar slowly, continuing to work until light.
5. Add the egg yolk and beat until light and fluffy.
6. Add the flour mixture alternately with the buttermilk, beating well after each addition.
7. Stir in the vanilla extract.
8. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg white.
9. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls 3 inches apart on a greased cookie sheet.
10. Flatten each cookie to about 1/2-inch thickness using a spatula.
11. Bake for 20 minutes or until done. Makes 18 3-inch cookies.
